testcase.name: test_create_honorary_invite_with_starting_balance

failure.message: AssertionError: Starting amount should be 5000 assert None == 5000 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2ae188700>('starting_amount') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2ae188700> = {'code': 'LIC-LNDEKKYC4WFDWFVE', 'invite_id': 'b6079133-dc80-4e26-a4ed-aa9383618a13', 'message': 'License invite created successfully', 'registration_url': 'https://diag-staging.preview.emergentagent.com/register/license/LIC-LNDEKKYC4WFDWFVE'}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_57.py:170: in test_create_honorary_invite_with_starting_balance assert data.get("starting_amount") == 5000, "Starting amount should be 5000" E AssertionError: Starting amount should be 5000 E assert None == 5000 E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2ae188700>('starting_amount') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2ae188700> = {'code': 'LIC-LNDEKKYC4WFDWFVE', 'invite_id': 'b6079133-dc80-4e26-a4ed-aa9383618a13', 'message': 'License invite created successfully', 'registration_url': 'https://diag-staging.preview.emergentagent.com/register/license/LIC-LNDEKKYC4WFDWFVE'}.get

testcase.name: test_create_honorary_invite_without_starting_balance

failure.message: AssertionError: Starting amount should be 0 assert None == 0 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2adff9940>('starting_amount') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2adff9940> = {'code': 'LIC-T50S75XROWXS_MGH', 'invite_id': '33340558-aeca-4bad-a45a-dd4e67bfdd93', 'message': 'License invite created successfully', 'registration_url': 'https://diag-staging.preview.emergentagent.com/register/license/LIC-T50S75XROWXS_MGH'}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_57.py:194: in test_create_honorary_invite_without_starting_balance assert data.get("starting_amount") == 0, "Starting amount should be 0" E AssertionError: Starting amount should be 0 E assert None == 0 E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2adff9940>('starting_amount') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9c2adff9940> = {'code': 'LIC-T50S75XROWXS_MGH', 'invite_id': '33340558-aeca-4bad-a45a-dd4e67bfdd93', 'message': 'License invite created successfully', 'registration_url': 'https://diag-staging.preview.emergentagent.com/register/license/LIC-T50S75XROWXS_MGH'}.get
